summary: Iteration 28 · Common Words UI redesign (mini audio players + per-track regenerate + batch selection) — FRONTEND-only validation PASS. On /admin/phonemes/u-foot after expanding the collapsed 'Parole comuni (con audio)' <Section>, verified: (a) all 30 rows render the new two-row layout with 11 distinct testids per row × 30 rows: editor-cw-{i}-w/ipa/note/expand PLUS two track cards editor-cw-{i}-ame + editor-cw-{i}-rp, each containing -select / -play / -regen / -clear = 30 × 11 = 330 fresh testids all present (counts: expand=30, ame=30, rp=30, ame-select=30, rp-select=30, ame-play=30, rp-play=30, ame-regen=30, rp-regen=30, ame-clear=30, rp-clear=30). (b) The OLD testid editor-cw-{i}-regen-both is NO LONGER in the DOM (0 matches). (c) editor-cw-bulk-missing (green 'Genera solo mancanti') and editor-cw-bulk-overwrite (rose 'Sovrascrivi tutti') still present. (d) editor-cw-bulk-selected fuchsia button is HIDDEN with 0 selection; after ticking editor-cw-0-ame-select + editor-cw-1-rp-select + editor-cw-2-ame-select the badge '3 selezionate' appears in the banner and the fuchsia 'Genera 3 selezionate' button becomes visible; clicking it fires POST /api/admin/phonemes/u-foot/batch-audio with EXACT body {only_keys:['word-0-AmE','word-1-RP','word-2-AmE'], overwrite:true, words_limit:30, include_words_rp:true}. After completion (~1s on preview): selectedTracks reset (all three checkboxes returned to unchecked, fuchsia button gone), toast '3 clip generate · 0 errori' shown, and the card refresh actually updated the three URLs to fresh /api/uploads/elevenlabs/… filenames. (e) Per-track regen: clicking editor-cw-0-ame-regen fires POST batch-audio with only_keys:['word-0-AmE'] alone (NO word-0-RP). After completion word-0 AmE URL flipped from https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/… to /api/uploads/elevenlabs/u-foot_word_look_AmE_mIrm7gNC_1783527011.mp3 while word-0 RP URL stayed at its pre-existing /api/uploads/elevenlabs/…_RP_… value → surgical single-track regen confirmed. (f) MiniAudioButton: click editor-cw-0-ame-play → class transitions from 'bg-slate-800 hover:bg-cyan-500/30 text-cyan-200' to 'bg-cyan-500 text-slate-900' + icon changes from '▶' to '■'; second click restores base styling + '▶'. (g) URL expander editor-cw-0-expand: with panel collapsed editor-cw-0-audio-ame and -audio-rp are NOT in DOM; after click they render as two <Input> fields prefilled with the current URLs, editable (typed a Z, value reflects), and after a second click on the expand toggle they disappear again.
critical_code_review_comments: regenCommonWordAudio() (PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx:426) and regenSelectedTracks() (line 480) both duplicate ~20 lines of fetch → refresh → merge → setToast logic. Same duplication in the two bulk buttons (lines 1587 and 1626). Extracting a shared runBatchAudio({only_keys, overwrite, successMsg}) helper would DRY four call-sites and shrink the file (still 2541 lines — well above the 700-line guideline).

MiniAudioButton (line 114) re-creates the <Audio> element on every src change via useEffect — CORRECT design choice to avoid stale cached playback after regen. Verified end-to-end: post-regen click on editor-cw-0-ame-play uses the NEW URL and does NOT replay the old customer-assets clip.

The three fetch blocks in the editor still lack a try/catch around res.json() — if the backend ever returns non-JSON on 500, the UI will throw an unhandled promise instead of showing the setError() branch. Very rare in practice, but a Promise.race/try wrap around res.json() would be more defensive.

The fuchsia 'Genera N selezionate' button is only clickable when selectedTracks.size > 0 (conditional render) — good. But regenSelectedTracks() also uses window.confirm() natively — inconsistent with shadcn Dialog vocabulary elsewhere; acceptable for admin-only cost-sensitive action, same pattern as bulk-missing/bulk-overwrite.

Existing observation from iter-27 still stands: phoneme_cards.py backend at 2951 lines and PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx frontend at 2541 lines are both well above the 700-line guideline — Parole-comuni + Audio Studio + AI drafting panels are all natural extraction candidates.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 7 acceptance criteria in the review verified: 30 rows × new testids; old regen-both removed; per-track surgical regen; batch selection workflow with correct POST payload; MiniAudioButton play/stop with re-created audio element on src change; expander shows/hides editable URL inputs; bulk banner regressions (missing + overwrite) intact.

test_credentials: admin / VocalFitness2026! (placeholder-based selectors; Enter on password submits; response.access_token JWT stored in localStorage). Post-login modal on /area-clienti + /admin/phonemes/u-foot dismissed with the OK button.
seed_data_creation: 3 clips regenerated on u-foot (look-AmE, good-RP, would-AmE) via the batch-selected button, plus 1 additional clip (look-AmE — a second time) via the per-track regen button. ~4 ElevenLabs credits burned total on the preview DB. Not destructive — all 60 clips on u-foot remain populated with valid /api/uploads/elevenlabs/… URLs after the test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified. All new common-words testids: editor-cw-{i}-w, -ipa, -note, -expand, -ame, -rp, {-ame,-rp}-{select,play,regen,clear}, and expanded-panel {-audio-ame,-audio-rp}. The 'Parole comuni (con audio)' <Section> is COLLAPSED by default — click the header once to reveal all rows before interacting. On /area-clienti and again on /admin/phonemes/u-foot a legacy 'Updated Title' popup modal pops up on first load — dismiss with OK. The nested-<button> hydration warning on public phoneme card pages is still present in preview (unchanged from iter-27, not in iter-28 scope). Use page.click() on the checkboxes with force=True — page.check() fails intermittently on nested rows outside initial viewport. To intercept POST payloads: page.on('request', …) filtering url contains '/batch-audio' and method=='POST' → req.post_data as raw JSON string.
rca of the issue: N/A — all iter-28 acceptance criteria verified end-to-end.
